game.title.description: Name of the Yahtzee game card on the home screen.
game.title.notes: Do not translate the game name.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Yahtzee game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Yahtzee play button.

round.header.description: Header showing current round out of 13.

section.upper.description: Header for the upper scoring section (Ones–Sixes).

section.lower.description: Header for the lower scoring section.

section.total.description: Label for the total score row.

bonus.label.description: Bonus row label — explains the 35-point bonus condition.

bonus.progress.description: Bonus progress display when bonus not yet earned.

bonus.achieved.description: Bonus progress display when bonus has been earned (shows checkmark).

category.threeOfAKind.description: Scoring category requiring three dice showing the same value.

category.fourOfAKind.description: Scoring category requiring four dice showing the same value.

category.fullHouse.description: Scoring category — three of one kind and two of another. Worth 25 points.
category.fullHouse.notes: The number (25) indicates the fixed point value — keep it.

category.smallStraight.description: Scoring category — four sequential dice. Worth 30 points.
category.smallStraight.notes: Keep abbreviated form. (30) is the point value.

category.largeStraight.description: Scoring category — five sequential dice. Worth 40 points.
category.largeStraight.notes: Keep abbreviated form. (40) is the point value.

category.yahtzee.description: Scoring category — five dice all the same. Worth 50 points.
category.yahtzee.notes: Do not translate 'Yahtzee!' — it is both the game name and the category name.

category.chance.description: Catch-all scoring category — sum of all dice.

score.scored.description: Accessibility text when a category is already scored.

score.potential.description: Accessibility text when a category can be scored this turn.

score.notAvailable.description: Accessibility text when a category cannot be scored this turn.

dice.label.description: Accessibility label for a die showing its index, value, and held state.
dice.label.notes: {{heldSuffix}} is either ', held' or empty string.

dice.labelBlank.description: Used when a die has no value yet (before first roll).

dice.heldSuffix.description: Appended to the die label when the die is held.

dice.hintAfterRoll.description: Hint text shown below dice after the first roll of a turn.

dice.hintBeforeRoll.description: Hint text shown below dice before any roll on a turn.

dice.holdHint.description: Accessibility hint for an unheld die.

dice.unholdHint.description: Accessibility hint for a held die.

roll.button.description: Roll button label showing remaining rolls.

roll.label_one.description: Accessibility label for roll button — singular (1 roll left).

roll.label_other.description: Accessibility label for roll button — plural (2–3 rolls left).

roll.rolling.description: Roll button text while the dice are being rolled.

roll.rollingLabel.description: Accessibility label while rolling is in progress.

gameOver.title.description: Modal title when the Yahtzee game ends after 13 rounds.

gameOver.finalScore.description: Label above the final score number.

gameOver.scoreLabel.description: Accessibility label for the final score.

gameOver.upperBonus.description: Notice shown when the player earned the upper section bonus.
gameOver.upperBonus.notes: The +35 is a fixed game value — preserve it.

gameOver.playAgain.description: Button text to return to home screen.

gameOver.playAgainLabel.description: Accessibility label for the play again button.
